mapper.insert: insert into users(id, username, email, password, bio, image) values( #{user.id}, #{user.username}, #{user.email}, #{user.password}, #{user.bio}, #{user.image} )
mapper.select: select id, username, email, password, bio, image from users where username = #{username}
select id, username, email, password, bio, image from users where email = #{email}
select id, username, email, password, bio, image from users where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from follows where user_id = #{followRelation.userId} and follow_id = #{followRelation.targetId}
mapper.select: select user_id as userId, follow_id as targetId from follows where user_id = #{userId} and follow_id = #{targetId}
